allow: Bash(python -c "from app.i18n import translate, get_locale, TRANSLATIONS; print\(translate\('flash.welcome', 'en', email='foo@bar.com'\)\); print\(translate\('flash.welcome', 'de', email='foo@bar.com'\)\); print\(len\(TRANSLATIONS['de']\), 'de keys'\); print\(len\(TRANSLATIONS['en']\), 'en keys'\); missing = set\(TRANSLATIONS['de']\) - set\(TRANSLATIONS['en']\); print\('missing in en:', missing\); extra = set\(TRANSLATIONS['en']\) - set\(TRANSLATIONS['de']\); print\('extra in en:', extra\)")
